testcase.classname: POST /api/verify should return 200 for valid data and save to Firestore
testcase.name: POST /api/verify should return 200 for valid data and save to Firestore

testcase.classname: Design Compliance Tests /api/config/theme Endpoint should return the exact hex codes from design.md
testcase.name: Design Compliance Tests /api/config/theme Endpoint should return the exact hex codes from design.md

testcase.classname: Design Compliance Tests /api/config/theme Endpoint should return only valid 6-digit hex color strings
testcase.name: Design Compliance Tests /api/config/theme Endpoint should return only valid 6-digit hex color strings

testcase.classname: Stripe Webhooks should process failed payment event and mark as processed
testcase.name: Stripe Webhooks should process failed payment event and mark as processed

testcase.classname: Stripe Webhooks should not process an event that has already been processed (idempotency test)
testcase.name: Stripe Webhooks should not process an event that has already been processed (idempotency test)

testcase.classname: Financial Logic Resilience should correctly calculate totals even if some fields are missing
testcase.name: Financial Logic Resilience should correctly calculate totals even if some fields are missing

testcase.classname: Financial Logic Resilience should handle stringified numbers from external APIs
testcase.name: Financial Logic Resilience should handle stringified numbers from external APIs

testcase.classname: Financial Logic Resilience should return isValid: false for empty datasets
testcase.name: Financial Logic Resilience should return isValid: false for empty datasets

testcase.classname: Financial Logic Resilience should handle null and undefined values gracefully
testcase.name: Financial Logic Resilience should handle null and undefined values gracefully

testcase.classname: Financial Logic Resilience should handle negative numbers correctly
testcase.name: Financial Logic Resilience should handle negative numbers correctly
